title: taraxacum lautellum
intro: Taraxacum lautellum, also known as the Dandelion Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lautellum include its ability to aid digestion, lower blood pressure, and support liver and kidney function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Taraxacum lautellum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
